query:
had a thought about context_briefing.  We are still not getting great response output from the signals we have available when the context_briefing runs.  here's my thought, and how things tie together.  \
\
1. context_cycle (start, is used to initiate a new feature... we used to have keywords on the tool, and have removed it (there is still a keywords data infrastructure for this currently).  My thought, on a feature that is starting, is to include a goal statement (1 sentence/2 max) which is the goal for the feature or task we're working on.  This gets stored, and placed in the feature histogram in memory)\
2. Agents today issue a number of context_search calls. My thought is to replace those search calls with 1 context_briefing which builds a prioritized index.  Context_briefing includes a 'task' (what is this agent supposed to do).  My thought, to enhance context_briefing, is to use the topic_goal (feature) combined with the task, to provide the prioritized index.  Agents tomorrow would issue 1 context_briefing.  Then they'be be able to context_get anything relevant immediately. and eliminate the multiple search calls. \
3. Availability of the feature goal would also improve the injection on the UDS path as well.\
\
thoughts?

col-025 Wave 3: SubagentStart goal-present branch placement in ContextSearch arm
